name: Ambrose
description: The Almighty Ambrose are a Latino (Mexican) Folk Nation street gang founded in 1958 in the Near West Side of Chicago at Taylor and Halsted in Little Italy. Named after St. Ambrose Church on 47th Street which sponsored their early baseball teams. When UIC campus construction destroyed their original neighborhood in 1964, they relocated to Pilsen at 18th and Throop (absorbing the Little Rampants). Symbols include a spear with letter 'A' and a knight's helmet. Part of the ATTSDN alliance with Two Six, Two Two Boys, and Satan Disciples in the late 70s-80s. Territory spans Pilsen, Heart of Chicago, Little Village, Brighton Park, and Cicero.
